1771370.name: Dark Invasion VR - Bunker Doomsday
1771370.description:
Get ready to swing your arms to run through an immersive horror shooter adventure. Dive into the beginning of the Dark Invasion and prepare to survive the beginning of the first session "Karens revenge!".
You are John Beggart a former college student and now part of a reconstruction team that is working in an old bunker that survived the 2nd world war. John shivers as he enters that place and does not know that his world soon falls over. He remembers how Karen got lost in this place of forsaken tales. They never found her again... till today..

-Fast paced VR zombie alien shooter horror
-Adventure elements and quests
-Fight with melee or ranged weapons
-Story driven campaign
1771370.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
